query:
SELECT
                user_id       AS "user_id!",
                username      AS "username!",
                display_name,
                avatar_url,
                nickname,
                joined_at     AS "joined_at!",
                has_sent_message AS "has_sent_message!"
            FROM analytics.server_member_cohort
            WHERE server_id = $1
              AND is_active = false
              AND ($2::timestamptz IS NULL OR joined_at < $2)
            ORDER BY joined_at DESC, user_id DESC
            LIMIT $3
